name: ASRO
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external AI governance-state attestation crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: ASRO can support independent witnessing of declared governance-state continuity.
ASRO can be mapped to host measurement, edge witnessing, verifier reconciliation, governance-state change, and selective-attestation terms.
non_claims: ASRO does not prove transition admissibility.
ASRO does not grant execution authority inside StegVerse.
ASRO attestation evidence may support review, but review does not become authority.

transition_table_mapping.claims: host-side governance-state measurement, edge-side witnessing, verifier reconciliation, governance-state change record, selective-attestation threat model
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, legal compliance guarantee, output-quality evaluation, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.input_artifact_type: attestation record or governance-state evidence artifact
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external attestation posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: host measurement, edge witnessing, verifier reconciliation, and governance-state change records
transition_table_mapping.receipt_or_trace_model: source reference, repository reference, and wiki record
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct governance-state attestation relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform evidence and review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Evidence Posture, Receipt-Bound Execution, Reconstructability, Drift, Commit-Time Validity
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, selective attestation uncertainty, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
